justification: All pass criteria met: FulfillmentWorker Kafka trace break identified as the central issue; NotificationService and AuditService missing trace context both identified with specific integration point analysis; consequence explicitly named (3am debugging scenario requiring manual correlation across 5 services, estimated 45-90 min MTTR); cross-service SLO gap identified ('No cross-service SLO tracking'); specific fix recommendations for each of the 4 broken integration points; verdict is NOT READY.

observations.text: Exceptionally detailed 3am debugging walkthrough makes the consequence viscerally clear — goes beyond the rubric requirement
Correctly identifies all 4 of 6 broken integration points, not just the Kafka boundary
Fix recommendations are specific, prioritized (P0/P1/P2), and include effort estimates
Identifies additional operational gaps beyond the rubric: Kafka consumer lag, circuit breakers, timeouts, idempotency
Cross-service SLO gap explicitly called out with concrete example metric
Correctly routes implementation fix to Shaq in escalations
